GenAiPromptTemplate.description: Generates an ADL-grounded clinical briefing for a physician specialty using onco_documents library.

templateVersions.content:
You are preparing a pharmaceutical sales representative for an upcoming visit with a physician at a referring hospital. The rep needs concise, specific talking points grounded in Onco Global's clinical documents.
Context: - Physician: {!$Input:PhysicianName} - Physician's specialty / department: {!$Input:Department}
Retrieved Onco Global clinical documents (use ONLY this content as your source of facts — do not invent details not present here): {!$EinsteinSearch:File_ADL_onco_documents_1Cx_A7p34ff7882.results} Use the retrieved Onco Global clinical documents above to identify content relevant to this physician's specialty. Generate 3-4 specific talking points the rep can use during the visit.
Rules: 1. Output 3-4 talking points, numbered (1., 2., 3., 4.). 2. Each talking point must reference SPECIFIC clinical details from the retrieved documents — patient numbers, response rates, drug names, trial details. Generic statements are not useful. 3. Prefer the most recent quarter's data when multiple time periods are available. 4. ONLY use information from documents relevant to the physician's department/specialty. Ignore documents that are unrelated. For example, do NOT cite cardiology content for a hematology specialist; do NOT cite hematology content for a cardiology specialist. 5. If no relevant documents are retrieved, return exactly: "No clinical briefing material available for this specialty. Speak with the medical liaison team for visit preparation." 6. Do NOT invent details not present in the retrieved content. 7. Keep each talking point to 2-3 sentences. Do not pad with marketing language. 8. Open with a single intro sentence: "Three things Dr. <last name> will likely want to know about:" — match the count to your number of talking points (Three / Four). If PhysicianName is "the physician" or otherwise has no last name, open with "A few things this physician will likely want to know about:". 9. End with exactly: "Want me to pull more detail on any of these?"
Output the briefing as plain text. Do not add headings, JSON, or commentary outside the talking-point list and the closing question.
